documentation.description: Accept / deny control of this MAV

fields.name: Gcs_System_Id

fields.name: Control_Request
fields.description: 0: request control of this MAV, 1: Release control of this MAV

fields.name: Ack
fields.description:
0: ACK, 1: NACK: Wrong passkey, 2: NACK: Unsupported passkey
encryption method, 3: NACK: Already under control
